caption: A man with blonde hair, wearing glasses, white over-ear headphones, and a dark blue textured shirt, speaks into a black microphone. He is positioned in front of a light-colored wood-paneled wall. To his left is a decorated Christmas tree with green needles and colorful blue, red, and yellow lights. Behind him is a framed screen displaying a blue and white graphic with the number "20" clearly visible. Across the sequence, the man is talking, with his mouth opening and closing. He initially raises his left hand in a gesturing motion, but his arm lowers and remains still in the subsequent frames. His facial expression remains focused as he continues to speak throughout the clip.
